# Blooming Marvellous

> Boutique florist in La Marina on the Costa Blanca South (Alicante, Spain). Bespoke, hand-made flower arrangements for every occasion, run by Lorena - with free delivery in La Marina and low-cost delivery across the wider Costa Blanca South.

Blooming Marvellous is a local boutique florist run by Lorena in Urbanización Oasis, La Marina (Alicante, Costa Blanca South, Spain). Every arrangement is designed and made by hand for the occasion - never off-the-shelf - using fresh, seasonal flowers. Delivery is free within La Marina, with a small delivery charge for surrounding Costa Blanca South areas (San Fulgencio, Guardamar del Segura, Ciudad Quesada, Rojales, Torrevieja, Santa Pola, Elche and Alicante), and same-day delivery is available for local orders. Orders are placed personally by WhatsApp, phone or email. The website is available in English, Spanish and German.

## Key pages
- [Home](https://bloomingmarvellousflowers.com/): Overview of the florist, occasions and how to order.
- [Our Flowers](https://bloomingmarvellousflowers.com/flowers): Bespoke bouquets and arrangements, with a gallery of recent work.
- [About Lorena](https://bloomingmarvellousflowers.com/about): The story behind the florist and her hand-made, personal approach.
- [Delivery](https://bloomingmarvellousflowers.com/delivery): How to order, delivery areas, charges and opening hours.
- [Contact](https://bloomingmarvellousflowers.com/contact): WhatsApp, phone, email and a contact form.

## Flowers for all occasions
- Weddings & Events
- Sympathy & Funerals
- Birthdays
- Anniversaries
- Mother's Day & Celebrations
- Everyday Bouquets

## Delivery
- Free delivery within La Marina.
- A small delivery charge applies to surrounding Costa Blanca South areas.
- Same-day delivery available for local orders.
- Service area: La Marina, San Fulgencio, Guardamar del Segura, Ciudad Quesada, Rojales, Torrevieja, Santa Pola, Elche, Alicante.

## Contact
- WhatsApp: +34 618 06 39 33
- Phone: +34 966 84 84 87
- Email: lorena@bloomingmarvellousflowers.com
- Address: Calle Virgen de la Asunción, Urbanización Oasis, La Marina, Alicante, Spain

## Other languages
- [Spanish / Español](https://bloomingmarvellousflowers.com/es/)
- [German / Deutsch](https://bloomingmarvellousflowers.com/de/)
